findings.finding: The root manifest currently describes Batch 94 instead of the website/PWA application.
findings.risk: PWA metadata and application identity are invalid or absent.
findings.action: Replace root manifest.json with one authoritative web app manifest. Keep batch manifests under versioned subfolders.

findings.finding: The service worker deletes every cache during activation and does not cache application assets.
findings.risk: Offline mode is non-functional and each activation wipes prior caches.
findings.action: Create a versioned cache, precache verified shell assets, add runtime caching, offline fallback, and controlled cleanup.

findings.finding: The sitemap contains only six top-level URLs.
findings.risk: Temple, sloka, festival, literature, regional, and knowledge pages are not discoverable through the sitemap.
findings.action: Generate the sitemap from verified published HTML routes only. Exclude framework, review-only, and placeholder pages.

findings.finding: Temple, sloka, and festival detail content is injected client-side using query parameters.
findings.risk: Deep content has weak crawlability, weak sharing metadata, and no stable page-specific canonical title/description in source HTML.
findings.action: Generate one static HTML page per verified entity and retain the JSON-powered interface as progressive enhancement.

findings.finding: Temple history values explicitly contain placeholder language.
findings.risk: Placeholder statements may be exposed to users and indexed as production content.
findings.action: Mark these records as draft, remove them from public indexation, and replace them only with source-backed summaries.

findings.finding: Every JSON request appends ?v=44 and uses cache:no-store.
findings.risk: The static site cannot benefit from normal browser/PWA caching, and the hard-coded version is stale after many batches.
findings.action: Use a release version constant and normal cache semantics with service-worker-managed invalidation.

findings.finding: Several tag arrays repeat the same slug twice.
findings.risk: Search weighting and metadata quality are degraded.
findings.action: Deduplicate and normalize tags during the search-index rebuild.

findings.finding: Recent commits use the generic message 'Add files via upload'.
findings.risk: It is difficult to trace which batch changed which production path or to roll back safely.
findings.action: Use batch-specific commit messages and release tags from Batch 143 onward.
